questionHtml:
Which products of the light-dependent reactions are used in the Calvin cycle?

A. O2 and hydrogen ions

B. ATP and CO2

C. Electrons and reduced NADP

D. ATP and reduced NADP

meta.title: Which products of the light-dependent reactions are used in the Calvin cycle? A. O2 and hydrogen ions B. ATP and CO2 C. Electrons and reduced NADP D. ATP and reduced NADP
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.19. Interdependence of the light-dependent and light-independent reactions
